free_text: A shotgun approach to the chart of the nuclides

for a known time and charge.
In order to uncouple the details of irradiation,
target constitution and isotopic abundance from the
physics dictating the yields of the 105 reactions,
all thick target yields are extrapolated to
both gamma energies and decay lives, with an
0.1< Egamma < 2 MeV by NBS traceable sources.
